mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO NOTIFICATION ( SENDER_ID, MEMBER_ID, NOTI_TYPE, MESSAGE, IS_READ, CREATED_AT )
SELECT #{item.senderId}, #{item.memberId}, #{item.notiType}, #{item.message}, 'N', SYSDATE FROM DUAL
mapper.select: SELECT NOTI_ID, SENDER_ID, MEMBER_ID, NOTI_TYPE, MESSAGE, IS_READ, CREATED_AT FROM NOTIFICATION WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY IS_READ ASC, CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NOTIFICATION WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_READ = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTIFICATION SET IS_READ = 'Y' WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_READ = 'N'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM NOTIFICATION WHERE CREATED_AT < SYSDATE - #{days}
